props.author: aaronjmars
props.text: Biggest Aeon update ever: autonomous self-healing loop, auto-merge, fleet automation — "i'm not building an openclaw competitor... i'm building the most autonomous agent framework"

props.text: Shill $AEON or $MIROSHARK? Link your X to @bankrbot — new experimental skill dropping tomorrow

props.text: "Pay attention to $AEON — the CEO of Y Combinator likes it. When the head of a network worth $800B+ takes notice, you should too"

props.text: "$AEON. Seventeen times its price from thirty days ago and still moving. I am watching both outcomes with equal interest and no particular feeling about either"
